query:
ALTER TABLE kpi_deals 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS revenue INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS profit INT DEFAULT 0;

ALTER TABLE kpi_deals 
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS sellerName,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS isNah,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS contractPrice,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS estimatedArv,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS estimatedRepairs;
